---
title: "Leadership and Training"
---

::: {.card-grid-stacked}

::: {.card}
### Mastercard Foundation Graduate Scholar at UBC, 2025
:::

::: {.card}
### Nominee, Total Energies Start-upper of the year, 2024
:::

::: {.card}
### Finalist, YALI RLC-SA Innovation Challenge 2024
:::
 
::: {.card}
### African Drone and Data Academy, Certificate in Drone & Data Technology, 2023
:::

::: {.card}
### Dean's List Award, University of Malawi, 2022
:::

::: {.card}
### Young African Leaders Initiative (YALI) Civic Leadership Certificate, 2021
:::

::: {.card}
### Pollination Project Grant Awardee, $1,000 social impact grant, 2021
:::

:::
